pageContext.name: Ultraman Suit Ver7 (Anime Version) Weapon Set
pageContext.description: Ultraman Suit Ver7's additional armaments as seen in the battle with the 'Star of Darkness' led by Alien Pedan are being released as a weapon set!  The FigZero 1:6 Ultraman Suit Ver7 (Anime Version) Weapon Set is designed for combining with the previously-released 1:6 Ultraman Suit Ver7 (Anime Version) Collectible Figure, which is sold separately.  The included weapons are 2 pieces of large-sized Specium weapon 'Wide Shot,' 2 pieces of the multi-purpose rifle 'EX-Rifle,' and 1 piece of additional Specium Sword for the two-sword fighting style.  Furthermore, an articulated back weapon rack for mounting the two EX-Rifles, a sheath for the additional Specium Sword, and an interchangeable right thigh armor for attaching the sheath are included. This now allows your 1:6 Ultraman Suit Ver7 (Anime Version) to be upgraded to Ver7.3!  Don't miss your chance to add this weapon set to your Ultraman collection today!
